title: module parameter, procedural assignment to wire detection is broken

features.name: procedural assignment to wire output
features.description: Code should include a procedural non-blocking assignment to a module output port that is declared as wire (not reg)

features.name: mixed reg and wire outputs with procedural assignment
features.description: Code should include a module with mixed reg and wire output ports where the wire output receives a procedural assignment
features.snippet:
output reg reg1,
output wire reg2
